function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "investigate", "action_id": "ask_guard_radio", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -0.4, "adjustment_reasons": ["Event source is a guard's own device, not an unknown entity — lowers likelihood of actionable threat", "background:true flag suggests a routine/system event rather than an intentional breach", "Hand-set prior (n=0) with no site history — weak prior, free to adjust downward"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.25, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If Andre Thomas (armed, 98% reliable) confirms he deliberately exited the zone for a valid reason (e.g., investigating perimeter, escorting someone out), I'd suppress. If he's unaccounted for or doesn't respond, I'd escalate to E2/E3 and dispatch backup."}
